html.description: Inline static HTML content to parse with Scrapling.

sourcePath.description: Absolute or relative path to a local HTML file to parse with Scrapling.

url.description: Safe public http/https URL to fetch with curl_cffi and parse with Scrapling using the durable configured Python environment.

selectors.description: Named CSS selectors to extract from the HTML.

includeText.description: Whether to include full-page extracted text.

includeLinks.description: Whether to include anchor text and href values from the extracted HTML.

timeoutMs.description: Optional execution timeout in milliseconds, clamped by the runtime executor; URL fetching is capped at 30000ms.
